   "reasoning": "You're talking about throwing money at a system that doesn't care about people like me. Funding boosts and teacher incentives won't do squat if they don't acknowledge that I'm barely scraping by, working four hours a day, and still can't afford to be in school. Scholarships are what'll really make a difference, but don't bother with the rest if you're not willing to listen to what students like me need.",
